| Encrypted State-Specific Medicaid Beneficiary ID | 
| PGM_ID | Program Identifier (1=FFS Medicare; 2=FFS Medicaid; 3=Dual) | 
| ADMSN_DT | Facility Admission Date | 
| AHCAH_WVR_SUBMSN_ID | AHCAH Waiver Submission ID | 
| PRVDR_NAME | Name of Facility | 
| PRVDR_PHNE_NUM | Facility Phone Number | 
| PRVDR_ADR | Facility Location Address | 
| PRVDR_CITY | Facility Location City | 
| PRVDR_ZIP_CD | Facility Location Zip Code |
